component.name: Fresco
component.summary: Set videos and images as live wallpapers

description.p: Fresco turns videos, GIFs, images, slideshows, and video playlists into your desktop wallpaper. Pick media in a simple app, click Set, then close the app — the wallpaper keeps playing and is restored on login.

ul.li: Looping video, animated GIF, static image, image slideshow, and video playlist wallpapers
Hardware-accelerated playback (VA-API / NVDEC) for low CPU usage without quality loss
A drag-to-crop and 90-degree rotate editor to frame exactly the region you want
Per-wallpaper sound and volume, plus slideshow transitions (crossfade, fade, slide, Ken Burns)
A wallpaper library with thumbnails, a recently-used row, and search
Pause / resume, pause-on-battery, and auto-pause when a window goes fullscreen
Multi-monitor support with per-display wallpapers and synced video playback
Add from a link: paste a Pinterest pin or a direct video/image URL
A command palette (Ctrl+K) for fast keyboard-driven control

description.p: Fresco runs on X11 and on Wayland layer-shell compositors (COSMIC, Hyprland, Sway, KDE Plasma 6); GNOME on Wayland uses a static-frame fallback.

Live wallpapers now work on Ubuntu 24.04-based systems (COSMIC, Pop!_OS 24.04, Mint 22): Fresco ships one renderer per libmpv generation and picks the right one automatically. Also: paste a Pinterest or direct media link to add a wallpaper, a media-first redesign with rich metadata cards and favorites, a Ctrl+K command palette, an optional browser new-tab wallpaper bridge with a companion extension, self-finishing in-app updates, and anonymous opt-out usage statistics (disclosed in-app).
Multi-monitor video sync, schedule rotation fixes, smoother Wayland frame timing, and optional feedback reminders.
Rotation polish: card thumbnails follow the edited rotation; hover previews no longer play in the wrong orientation.
Reliable per-wallpaper sound, pixel-true 4K/8K quality, an in-app wallpaper catalog, per-display wallpapers, day/night schedules, add-from-URL, and X11 fullscreen auto-pause.
In-app updates with live progress, responsive layout, and a live status pill.
Rotate wallpapers, reliable per-wallpaper sound, native Wayland layer-shell probe.
Restore-on-login self-heal and cold-boot playback recovery.
Wayland layer-shell support, fullscreen auto-pause, update notifications.

ul.li: Fixed a freeze/crash when changing the wallpaper.
Add and Add Folder now work; the file dialog shows videos and images by default.
The GNOME overview and lock screen now match the live wallpaper.
